name: Intercorp
description_short: Intercorp Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial cooperative offering savings accounts, loans, credit cards, and cash advances to eligible members with lifetime membership benefits.
description_long:
Intercorp Credit Union operates as a full-service, not-for-profit cooperative financial institution structured to serve the security and prosperity of its members and employees. The organization functions as a community financial service provider with governance by an elected board of directors and transparent annual meetings for member participation.

The credit union provides a comprehensive range of financial products including share savings accounts, share certificates, IRAs, auto loans, signature loans, recreational vehicle loans, share-secured loans, credit cards with rewards programs, and cash advances at fixed rates. Members also gain access to ancillary services such as ATM networks through MEMBERS Financial Network, online account management, telephone banking, check ordering, guaranteed auto protection, identity theft protection resources, and a car buying service. The eZCard platform enables online credit card management and payments.

Intercorp distinguishes itself through member ownership structure where earnings above required reserves are returned to members as lower loan interest rates and competitive savings dividends. The credit union offers lifetime membership to qualifying members and their immediate family, which persists even if members change employment or relocate. Membership requires completion of a membership card and a minimum $25 opening deposit to a share savings account. The organization explicitly positions itself as member-centric rather than profit-driven.

The primary limitation is that membership eligibility criteria are not fully detailed on the website—specific occupational, geographic, or associational requirements are referenced but not clearly defined. Cash advances carry higher interest rates and fees than regular purchases with no grace period, meaning interest accrues immediately. Members should carefully review fee schedules and loan terms, as these critical details are referenced but not comprehensively displayed on the public website.
services: Share savings accounts with competitive dividend rates
Credit cards with Scorecard Rewards program
ATM access through MEMBERS Financial Network
Identity theft information and protection resources
pros: Member ownership returns earnings above reserves as lower loan rates and competitive dividend rates
Lifetime membership benefits extend to immediate family members even if they change jobs or move
Comprehensive product suite including auto loans, recreational vehicle loans, signature loans, and share-secured loans
eZCard platform enables online credit card payments and account management from home
MEMBERS Financial Network provides expanded ATM access beyond Intercorp locations
Guaranteed auto protection and identity theft information resources available to members
Scorecard Rewards credit card program offers incentive structure for cardholders
Teen Financial Network program indicates youth financial education commitment
cons: Membership eligibility criteria not clearly specified on website—specific occupational or associational requirements remain undefined
Cash advances carry higher interest rates and fees than regular purchases with no grace period; interest accrues immediately
Detailed fee schedules and specific loan rates are referenced but not displayed on public website pages
Limited geographic or organizational context provided—no clear indication of service area or membership field of membership
Complaint notice is referenced but process and contact information not detailed on available pages
best_for: Individuals seeking member-owned financial institution with profit-sharing dividend benefits
Families wanting lifetime banking relationship that extends to immediate family members
Members needing comprehensive loan products including recreational vehicle and signature loans
Credit union members prioritizing online account management and mobile payment options
diagnosis: Intercorp Credit Union is best for individuals eligible for membership seeking a member-owned financial institution where profits are returned as competitive rates and dividends rather than going to shareholders. The primary caveat is that specific membership eligibility requirements (field of membership) are not clearly detailed on the website, so prospective members should contact the credit union directly to confirm eligibility before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Intercorp — NCUA-insured credit union in AMARILLO, TX. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
